metadata.description: A non-human identity/account — an ACTOR (automation, an agent, a provider integration, an API-key holder) that DCM authenticates and authorizes (ADR-RBAC-001). actor_type `service_account`. Holds no secret material — credentials referenced (Security.CredentialRef). Backs the built-in provider's static_api_key/service accounts.

handle.description: Service-account name, unique within the realization.

authenticated_by.description: Auth Provider that authenticates it (built-in by default).

credential_ref.description: Reference to a Security.CredentialRef (API key / token) — never inline.

actor_uuid.description: The stable actor id referenced by role-assignments and DCMGroup (access_grouping) membership.

relationships.description: Member of an access DCMGroup / Identity.Group; membership drives role binding.
